name: Train-Top Mania
author: Poki
description: Train-Top Mania is a 2D platformer shooter with a straightforward objective. You're stranded on top of a moving train with a never-ending stream of enemies coming at you. Be patient with your ammunition, as you have to fire at just the right time! What's your high score? How to play: Fire - LMB or Space About the creator: Train-Top Mania is created by Chinykian. This is their first game on Poki!
